title: viola × egglestoniana
intro: Viola × egglestoniana, also known as Eggleston's pansy violet, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae, derived from a cross between Viola sororia and Viola lanceolata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viola × egglestoniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Viola × egglestoniana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
